cn: 今天分享的是：《谁动了我的奶酪》。
prompt: A giant yellow cheese block glowing in dark mysterious maze, dramatic lighting, cinematic, 4k

cn: 这是一本改变亿万人命运的书。
en: A book that changed millions of lives
prompt: An ancient magical book glowing with golden light rays, dark background, mystical atmosphere

cn: 故事里有两个小矮人和两只小老鼠。
en: Two little people and two little mice
prompt: Two cute tiny cartoon mice and two tiny people characters standing together, colorful illustration style

cn: 他们生活在一个巨大的迷宫里。
en: They live in a giant maze
prompt: Aerial view of giant labyrinth maze, mysterious fog, dramatic shadows, cinematic lighting
A mountain pile of various colorful cheese blocks in golden cave, warm lighting, abundance

cn: 直到有一天，奶酪突然不见了！
en: Until one day, the cheese disappeared
prompt: An empty dark cave space with dramatic shadows, eerie emptiness, shock and loss atmosphere

cn: 两只小老鼠立刻出去寻找新的奶酪。
en: The mice immediately went to find new cheese
prompt: Two determined cute mice running fast through maze corridors, motion blur, adventurous spirit

cn: 但两个小矮人却一直在原地等待。
en: But the little people just waited
prompt: Two sad tiny people sitting alone in dark empty cave, hopeless waiting, emotional

cn: 他们不接受变化，还一直抱怨。
prompt: An angry tiny person shouting at empty space, frustration, dark atmosphere

cn: 直到饿到不行，才被迫出发。
en: Only when starving did they finally move
prompt: An exhausted tiny person walking slowly through dark maze tunnel, determination, dramatic backlight

cn: 最终他们找到了更多更好的奶酪！
en: Finally they found even better cheese
prompt: Joyful celebration scene with mountains of golden cheese, bright warm light, happiness, triumph
A beautiful butterfly emerging from cocoon with golden light rays, transformation, inspirational
A person running toward bright light at end of dark tunnel, motivational, power, determination

cn: 当你感到迷茫时，读读这本书。
prompt: A person reading a glowing magical book in dark room, warm light from book, wisdom

en: It will give you the answer
prompt: A bright lightbulb moment with golden rays, eureka, clarity, inspiration
Two hands reaching toward each other connecting, sunrise background, hope, growth
